result:
## Round 66 Goal

**Build a Regime Dashboard overlay that synthesizes signals from existing meta-analytical overlays into a single unified status panel.**

The system has 32 overlays but the user can only view 1-2 at a time. The last 6 rounds built powerful meta-tools (correlation matrix, power spectrum, coherence, causal emergence, early warning, Hurst exponent) that each reveal one facet of system state. A dashboard overlay would aggregate them into one view showing:

- **Current regime** (Wolfram class from overlay 19)
- **Transition risk** (early warning tau trends from overlay 31)
- **Memory character** (Hurst H from overlay 32, persistent/antipersistent/random)
- **Dominant frequency** (peak from power spectrum overlay 30)
- **Emergence scale** (peak EI scale from causal emergence overlay 29)
- **Active anomalies** (flagged metrics from anomaly detector)
- **Sparkline histories** for key indicators

Pure exploitation — no new algorithms, just a synthesis layer over existing infrastructure. Key `5`.

Shall I build it?
